  1. FoundationCode
  2. pages

Uses of Package
pages

Packages that use pages
Package
Description
databasePart1
 
logic
The logic package contains the core business logic and utility functions for user interaction, clarification handling, and input recognition used throughout the application.
pages
The pages package contains all the JavaFX-based user interface (UI) components of the application.
  • Classes in pages used by databasePart1
    Class
    Description
    RankReviewer.TrustedReviewerRow
    Represents a row in the trusted reviewer table including reviewer ID, username, name, rating, and score.
  • Classes in pages used by logic
    Class
    Description
    AdminHomePage
    AdminHomePage represents the admin interface.
    InstructorHomePage
    The InstructorHomePage class represents the home page for instructors.
    StaffPage
    Staff moderation dashboard: shows questions/answers/clarifications and moderation flags.
  • Classes in pages used by pages
    Class
    Description
    MyQAPage
    The MyQAPage class displays questions created by the logged-in user.
    ReviewPage
    ReviewPage - shows either: - "My Reviews" (show(stage,user)) OR - "Reviews for a selected Answer" (showForAnswer(stage,user,answer))
    WelcomeLoginPage
    The WelcomeLoginPage class displays a welcome screen for authenticated users.
